
	 vim:linebreak:nowrap:nospell:cul tw=78 fo=tqlnr foldcolumn=3 
	 
--- 
# Spaces, no Tabs
title: Template for .Rmd 
date: "`r paste('last updated', 
    format(lubridate::now(), '%H:%M, %d %B %Y'))`"
output: 
  pdf_document: 
    latex_engine: xelatex
toc: TRUE 
toc_depth:  1 
fontsize: 12pt 
geometry: margin=0.5in,top=0.25in 
---

---
othercomments
---

<!-- 
set cul   "cursorline
cc=+1			"colorcolumn is 1 more than tw
-->

<!--  commments -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE		}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,  
											comment="      ##",  
											error=TRUE, 
											collapse=TRUE) 
```

<!--  RENDER:  see bottom -->

```{r library, include=FALSE		}
library(jimTools) 
``` 

https://github.com/pharmaR/riskmetric/issues/176
```{r begin}
?getNamespaceExports()
```

```{r}
# returns chr[]
getNamespaceExports("dplyr")   #285

# from help:
# ns: string or namespace object.
# name: string or name.

# returns named data.frame x, freq
z  <- getNamespaceExports("dplyr") %>% plyr::count()
z %>% dplyr::filter(freq > 1)

```

```{r}
# returns named list  x, freq
# compare function names in 2 packages
counts <- c(getNamespaceExports("plyr"), getNamespaceExports("dplyr")) %>% 
  plyr::count() %>% 
  dplyr::filter(freq > 1)
counts
nrow(counts)
```

***

```{r knit_exit()} 
knitr::knit_exit() 
```

/newpage

```{r render, eval=FALSE	} 
file <- "" 
file  <- basename(file) 
dir <-"rmd"

jimTools::ren_pdf(file,dir)
jimTools::ren_github(file, dir)
```
